name: Spiced Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Beat together the shortening, sugar, and tofu in a bowl until smooth.
3. Stir in the baking powder, salt, cumin, coriander, red pepper flakes, and lemon juice.
4. Mix in the flour, cornmeal, and soymilk until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled loaf pan.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool slightly in the pan before turning it out onto a wire rack to finish cooling.
